text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're at the autumn Tenno Sho and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's on the up and up, and people's
expectations for her continue to rise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Narita Brian's poor health persists and
people are beginning to lose faith in her. Hishi
Amazon feels that the only thing she can do is
wait for her to recover.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During an interview before the Japan Cup, Hishi
Amazon declares to everyone that her rival is
Narita Brian, and Narita Brian alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's adamant that her rival will make a
comeback. The conviction rubs off on the public,
restoring some of their faith.
